ns1:revision.ns1:comment: add links to adjacent LUG events
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
Sun, sand and Lustre! To celebrate one of the biggest years for Lustre – multiple new Lustre installations and now clocking at over 1TB/sec – LUG ’13 successfully took place in San Diego at the Omni Hotel in the Downtown Gaslamp Quarter. Sessions were held from April 16-18.
==LUG 2013 Agenda==
===Tuesday, April 16, 2013 - LUG Day 1 - Omni Hotel ===
{| border=1 cellpadding=0 |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''7:00 - 8:00''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Breakfast''' |- |'''8:00 - 8:10''' |'''''Welcome Remarks''''' |- |'''8:10 - 8:45''' |'''''OpenSFS Update''''' :Norman Morse & Galen Shipman, OpenSFS |- |'''8:45 - 9:20''' |'''''EOFS Update''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T1Ik-nihbCI (Video)] :Hugo Falter, EOFS |- |'''9:20 - 9:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Xyratex_Update-Kevin_Canady.pdf|Xyratex Update]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mHG4hbgHN9k (Video)] :Kevin Canady, Xyratex |- |'''9:30 - 10:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Lustre_Releases-Peter_Jones.pdf|Lustre Releases]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YT8xl95ayOQ (Video)] :Peter Jones, Intel |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''10:00 - 10:20''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Break''' |- |'''10:20 - 10:40''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Layout_Lock-Jinshan_Xiong.pdf|Layout Lock]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aASiRGHbovU (Video)] :Jinshan Xiong, Intel |- |'''10:40 - 11:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-DNE_Phase_I-Wang_Di.pdf|Distributed Namespace Environment (DNE) Phase 1]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Xar5JmTHBVM (Video)] :Di Wang, Intel |- |'''11:00 - 11:20''' |'''''Software vs. Hardware RAID and Implications for the Future''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bu4mPmou4sU (Video)] :Alan Poston, Xyratex |- |'''11:20 - 11:40''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-LLNL_Sequoia-Chris_Morrone.pdf|Sequoia and the ZFS OSD]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j3bBg19YsKI (Video)] :Christopher Morrone, Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory |- |'''11:40 - 12:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Warp_Mechanics_ZFS-Josh_Judd.pdf|ZFS and Lustre go to Hollywood]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=il67RhdDp4M (Video)] :Josh Judd, Warp Mechanics |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''12:00 - 1:00''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Lunch''' |- |'''1:00 - 1:20''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Xyratex_Contribution_Model-Nathan_Rutman.pdf|Lustre Contribution Model]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tB_8pU0w-9w (Video)] :Nathan Rutman, Xyratex |- |'''1:20 - 1:40''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-State_of_Lustre-DDN-Dave_Fellinger.pdf|The State of the Lustre File System and The Lustre Development Ecosystem: A 2013 Report Card]]''''' :Dave Fellinger, DataDirect Networks |- |'''1:40 - 2:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Xyratex_Lustre_Acqusition-Kevin_Canady.pdf|Lustre Acquisition and Its Future]]''''' :Peter Bojanic, Xyratex |- |'''2:00 - 2:40''' |'''''OpenSFS CDWG Meeting''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GPtRWw_Bkbg (Video)] :Chris Morrone, OpenSFS |- |'''2:40 - 3:00''' |'''''The Lustre Community in Europe''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TnmK5_-CkfU (Video)] :Torben Kling Petersen Phd, Xyratex |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''3:00 - 3:30''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Break''' |- |'''3:30 - 3:50''' |'''''Lustre Tuning Parameters''''' :Bobbie Lind, Intel |- |'''3:50 - 4:10''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Hadoop_Lustre-Omkar_Kulkani.pdf|Hadoop Map Reduce Over Lustre]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U-qlt8EX0cc (Video)] :Omkar Kulkarni, Intel |- |'''4:10 - 4:30''' |'''''An Intro to Ceph for HPC''''' :Sage Weil, Inktank |- |'''4:30 - 4:50''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Lustre_on_AWS-Robert_Read.pdf|Lustre on Amazon Web Services]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xM1bGsTeLGM (Video)] :Robert Read, Intel |- |'''4:50 - 6:00''' |'''''Vendor Presentations''''' : Aeon Computing [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0H9QU-njrj0 (Video)], Bull [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kgeNSPuNQOI (Video)], Cray [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Tls-mZyaOQM (Video)], DDN [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=A8B649og4Ow (Video)], EMC [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KVLbZ9J8X6Y (Video)], Intel [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3734nYIGbTQ (Video)], NetApp [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YWxo-VOYdvo (Video)], Warp Mechanics [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=APhuIqDUZhU (Video)], Xyratex |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''6:00''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Adjourn''' |- |}
===Wednesday, April 17, 2013 - LUG Day 2 - Omni Hotel ===
{| border=1 cellpadding=0 |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''7:00 - 8:00''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Breakfast''' |- |'''8:00 - 8:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Lustre-2.5-Beyond.pdf|Lustre 2.5 and Beyond]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FwgZ3EuuNL8 (Video)] :Andreas Dilger, Intel |- |'''8:30 - 8:50''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-DAOS_API-Johann_Lombardi.pdf|DAOS Changes to Lustre]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D9MUO8w6BYs (Video)] :Johann Lombardi, Liang Zhen, Intel |- |'''8:50 - 9:10''' |'''''[[Media:Zhuravlev_LFSCK_LUG-2013.pdf|Online LFSCK]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jfLo1eYSh2o (Video)] :Alexey Zhuravlev, Intel |- |'''9:10 - 10:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-OpenSFS_TWG.pdf|OpenSFS TWG Meeting]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=71l-Kzoga4w (Video)] :David Dillow & John Carrier, OpenSFS |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''10:00 - 10:20''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Break''' |- |'''10:20 - 10:40''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-User-Defined_Transport_Protocols-NRL.pdf|User-Defined Transport Protocols for Lustre]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8xaECmd4RVU (Video)] :Eric Kinzie (ITT Exelis) / Linden Mercer (Penn State), NRL |- |'''10:40 - 11:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Lustre_Multiple_Interface_Performance-NASA.pdf|Exploring Multiple Interface Lustre Performance from a Single Client]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NLaatMohZ8c (Video)] :Jim Karellas and Mahmoud Hanafi, NASA Ames Research Center |- |'''11:00 - 11:20''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Active_Active_Channel_Bonding-Ihara.pdf|Active-active LNET Bonding Using Multiple LNETs and Infiniband partitions]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UIEkeFNnt4U (Video)] :Shuichi Ihara, DataDirect Networks |- |'''11:20 - 11:40''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-TCP_LND_ORNL.pdf|Getting the Most Out of Lustre with the TCP LND]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vgQZ8cywbpQ (Video)] :Blake Caldwell, Oak Ridge National Laboratory |- |'''11:40 - 12:00''' |'''''Wireshark''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uyzDRgoyfOo (Video)] :Doug Oucharek, Intel |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''12:00 - 1:00''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Lunch''' |- |'''1:00 - 2:00''' |'''''Lustre in Commercial Space Panel |- |'''2:00 - 2:20''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Lustre_Static_Code_Analysis-Bull.pdf|Lustre Static Code Analysis with Coverity]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xfFq-mzTvd8 (Video)] :Sebastien Buisson, Bull |- |'''2:20 - 2:40''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Lustre_Testing-Chris_Gearing.pdf|Lustre Test and Validation Toolset]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7rEZO8UPUVo (Video)] :Chris Gearing, Intel |- |'''2:40 - 3:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Lustre_Manual-Richard_Henwood.pdf|Lustre Manual]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6IwQQ8lj2mU (Video)] :Richard Henwood, Intel |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''3:00 - 3:30''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Break''' |- |'''3:30 - 3:50''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Lustre_Gemini_LND-ORNL.pdf|Overcoming Gemini LNET Performance Hurdles]]''''' :David Dillow and James Simmons, Oak Ridge National Laboratory |- |'''3:50 - 4:10''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Lustre_And_Friends_Testbed-Bank_of_Italy.pdf|Performance & Functionality Testbed for Clustered Filesystems: Lustre and some of its friends]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PF2PzjBuOWY (Video)] :Giuseppe Bruno, Bank of Italy |- |'''4:10 - 4:30''' |'''''A New Metric for File System Load''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GIK2MlwFulY (Video)] :Andrew Uselton, Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory |- |'''4:30 - 4:50''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-HPCS_Scenarios-Carrier.pdf|HPCS Scenarios Update]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2kwp_GZxg6Q (Video)] :John Carrier, Cray |- |'''4:50 - 5:50''' |'''''OpenSFS BWG Meeting''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UhxsAlSry7o (Video)] :Sarp Oral, OpenSFS |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''5:50''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Adjourn''' |- |}
===Thursday, April 18, 2013 - LUG Day 3 - Omni Hotel ===
{| border=1 cellpadding=0 |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''7:00 - 8:00''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Breakfast''' |- |'''8:00 - 8:20''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Next_Gen_Spider_Atlas-ORNL.pdf|The next-generation 1 TB/s Spider file system at OLCF]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7dQzluDjl50 (Video)] :Sarp Oral, Oak Ridge National Laboratory |- |'''8:20 - 8:40''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Xyratex_High_Availability_in_Lustre-John_Fragalla.pdf|High Availability in Lustre - Enterprise RAS]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nM5Put8vCR0 (Video)] :John Fragalla, Xyratex |- |'''8:40 - 9:00''' |'''''Managing and Monitoring a Scalable Lustre Infrastructure''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0DvLn2Q1xvc (Video)] :Makia Minich, Xyratex |- |'''9:00 - 9:20''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Robinhood-CEA.pdf|Robinhood Policy Engine]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=b9qyeDyTF64 (Video)] :Aurelien Degremont, CEA |- |'''9:20 - 9:40''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Sequoia_Data_Migration_Experiences-Stearman.pdf|Sequoia Data Migration Experiences]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FamWy_c95Wo (Video)] :Marc Stearman, Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory |- |'''9:40 - 10:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Lustre_HSM_And_Cloud-DDN.pdf|Lustre HSM & Cloud: An Open Discussion on the Future of Lustre HSM,]]''''' '''''[[Media:LUG2013-Lustre_HSM_And_Cloud-DDN.pdf|Storage Tiering, File/Block/Object Backing Stores & Lustre File Geo-Distribution]]''''' :Ashley Pittman and Dan Maslowski, DataDirect Networks |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''10:00 - 10:30''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Break''' |- |'''10:30 - 11:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-OpenSFS_General_Assembly-Terri_Quinn.pdf|OpenSFS General Assembly]]''''' :Terri Quinn & Tommy Minyard, OpenSFS |- |'''11:00 - 11:20''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Fujitsu-Lustre-2.x-Contributions.pdf|Fujitsu Contributions to Lustre]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sagDN9pj6Xk (Video)] :Shinji Sumimoto '''''[[Media:LUG2013-Fujitsu_Contributions-Oleg_Drokin.pdf|Fujitsu Contributions Merged]]''''' Oleg Drokin, Fujitsu/Intel |- |'''11:20 - 11:40''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-ChangeLog_Efficient_Searching-Pittman.pdf|Using Changelogs for Efficient Search and Content Discovery]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NkpatgW78Vg (Video)] :Ashley Pittman, DataDirect Networks |- |'''11:40 - 12:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-DNS_NIDS-Oucharek.pdf|A Need for a DNS-like feature for LNet NIDs]]''''' :Doug Oucharek, Intel |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''12:00 - 1:00''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Lunch''' |- |'''1:00 - 1:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Next_Generation_Filesystem-Seager.pdf|Next Generation Storage Architectures for Exascale]]''''' :Mark Seager, Intel |- |'''1:30 - 2:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Exascale10-Xyratex.pdf|EIOW - a Framework for Exa-Scale I/O]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CNqbW79KfV8 (Video)] :Meghan McClelland, Xyratex |- |'''2:00 - 2:30''' |'''''Performance Evaluation of FEFS on K Computer and Fujitsu’s Roadmap toward Lustre 2.x''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zi5oYSx8tIk (Video)] :Shinji Sumimoto, Fujitsu |- |'''2:30 - 3:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Fast_Forward_to_Exascale-Eric_Barton.pdf|Lustre - Fast Forward to Exascale]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pn_EEbmohDU (Video)] :Eric Barton, Intel |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''3:00 - 3:30''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Break''' |- |'''3:30 - 4:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Lustre_and_Beyond_Panel-Fujitsu.pdf|Lustre and Beyond Panel]]''''' :Fujitsu |- |'''4:30 - 4:50''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Lustre_at_FNAL-AlexK.pdf|Lustre at FNAL]]''''' :Alex Kulyavtsev, Fermilab |- |'''4:50 - 5:10''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Xyratex_Lustre_at_BlueWaters-Nathan_Rutman.pdf|Lustre at BlueWaters]]''''' :Nathan Rutman, Xyratex |- |'''5:10 - 5:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Lustre_SDSC_Data_Oasis-Wagner.pdf|SDSC’s Data Oasis: Balanced Performance and Cost-Effective Lustre File Systems]]''''' :Rick Wagner, SDSC and Jeff Johnson, Aeon Computing |- |'''5:30 - 5:50''' |'''''[[Media:LUG2013-Madness-of-Project-George-Evans.pdf|The Madness of Project George]]''''' :Ben Evans, Terascala |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''5:50''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''End of LUG 2013''' |- |} [[Lustre User Group 2012|<- LUG'12]] | [[Lustre User Group 2014|LUG'14 ->]]
